name: CheckWise PDF metadata dry run - visual OCR AI Sheets

parameters.content:
## 1. Upload intake
PDF + document type + user context. This is the only human input at the start.

## 2. CheckWise backend
Calls your local backend through this public tunnel: https://kitty-produces-dow-sense.trycloudflare.com

## 3. Safety gate
Legal approval stays false. Human review stays required. AI and Sheets do not run in the backend.

## 4. AI suggestions
Create an n8n OpenAI credential named `OpenAI CheckWise Metadata`, then select it in the OpenAI node.

## 5. Google Sheets audit row
Create an n8n Google Sheets OAuth credential named `Google Sheets CheckWise Metadata`, then set the Spreadsheet ID.

parameters.formDescription: Upload one PDF and choose the expected document type. The backend will use the real CheckWise metadata rulebook, run local OCR, and return a human-review payload.

values.formSubmittedText: CheckWise metadata dry run completed. Return to n8n to inspect the review payload, OCR result, AI suggestion, and Sheets append.

nodes.name: POST PDF to CheckWise backend with OCR
Parse AI suggestions for human review

main.node: POST PDF to CheckWise backend with OCR
Parse AI suggestions for human review
